escalate: Add the cx's full name & which region they're shopping from (US, CA, or AU) in the ESC notes
Add the product links cx are inquiring about to your ESC notes
templates: For post purchase issues, use OIS shortcut
For gift exchange inquiries, use GEX shortcut
If the cx didn't receive the gift from the gift exchange program!, use GGE shortcut
If cx's say the item they want isn't on sale, don't use ncode, use SGS temp
dos_and_donts: Send links only from the US site
Use NordLayer when accessing their website

Helix Sleep: Hi there! Want to track your order? 

When your order ships you'll receive an email with your FedEx tracking information. The best way to access up-to-date information is through our order tracking page here: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/asDcxiyLvjgy

Helix Sleep: Need help setting up your Helix mattress? 

1. Once your bed arrives, remove the mattress from the box and set it on your foundation while it's still encased in plastic. 

2. Remove the mattress from its plastic wrapping, give it 2 hours to regain its shape, and you're done! The embroidered Helix logo should be upright and positioned at the foot of the bed. Visit the instructions page here:
https://helixsleep.attn.tv/auQWavn4GOFB

Helix Sleep: We want to be sure you love your purchase! That's why we offer a 120 night sleep trial, which begins on the day of delivery. 

If you're unhappy with your purchase for any reason, you can return it for a full refund within the 120 night trial period. Mattresses require a 30-Day break-in period before you're eligible for a return. Learn More: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/a3jeTU_WVQ-L

promotions.title: WC20
content: Applies to items marked as 'Sale' only, receive extra 20% off sale items when you purchase $300 or more. Only send to customer inquiring about sale items.

promotions.title: WC15
content: Applies to items marked as 'Sale' only, receive extra 15% off sale items when you purchase $200 or more. Only send to customer inquiring about sale items.

promotions.title: WC10
content: Applies to items marked as 'Sale' only, receive extra 10% off sale items when you purchase $100 or more. Only send to customer inquiring about sale items.

Braun: I'm afraid I don't see any orders on my end, but that could be due to my limited system. Could you let me know when you placed your order and if you received any tracking info? Sometimes our emails can end up in your spam or promo folder, so please check there as well!
